query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tv_idea_analyses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tvIdeaId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `decision` enum('execute','watch','ignore') NOT NULL,
  `confidence` int NOT NULL,
  `summary` varchar(200),
  `reasoning` text,
  `marketContext` text,
  `riskWarning` text,
  `notified` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tvIdeaId` int NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `decision` enum('execute','watch','ignore') NOT NULL,
  `confidence` int NOT NULL,
  `summary` varchar(200),
  `reasoning` text,
  `marketContext` text,
  `riskWarning` text,
  `notified` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
